title: Neural Roto Assistant
description: A Python script integrated into Nuke that automates rotoscoping of complex hair using PyTorch models.

content.text: The Neural Roto Assistant was developed to solve the bottleneck of manual rotoscoping in high-volume VFX shots. By leveraging a custom-trained PyTorch model, the tool can predict hair edges with 95% accuracy.

content.caption: The custom node graph implementation in Nuke.

content.text: The pipeline integrates directly into the Nuke interface via a custom Python shelf tool. It utilizes OpenCV for pre-processing and passes masks directly to the node graph, allowing artists to refine the results with minimal effort.
Performance benchmarks show a 60% reduction in manual labor time per shot. The model was trained on over 5,000 frames of complex hair data.

title: Custom VEX Fluid Solver
description: Optimized fluid simulation solver for Houdini. Reduces cache size by 40% without sacrificing visual fidelity.

content.text: Standard fluid solvers often struggle with high-resolution simulations due to memory constraints. This custom VEX solver implements a sparse grid optimization technique.
By reducing the cache size by 40%, we were able to simulate scenes that previously crashed the system. The visual fidelity remains identical to the standard solver.

title: VFX & Computational Intelligence
slogan: We don't just simulate — we engineer perception
description: Bridging Creative VFX with Custom Tooling & AI Solutions.
